revision.text:
[[ja:ひさご塚古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|location={{ill|Higashisonogi|qid=Q942035|1=Higashisonogi, Nagasaki}}|coordinates={{Coord|33.035555555556|N|129.92|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}|architectural_styles={{ill|keyhole-shaped kofun|qid=Q11268718|1=Zenpōkōenfun|2=ja|3=前方後円墳|4=ko|5=전방후원분|6=zh|7=前方後圓墳}}}} {{日本の古墳 |名称=ひさご塚古墳 |alternate_name=ひょうたん塚
彼杵の古墳（Historic Site Designation名称） |location=[[:en:長崎県|長崎県]][[東彼杵郡]][[東彼杵町]]彼杵宿郷字古金屋道上430番地5{{Cite web|author=長崎県教育庁学芸文化課|url=http://www.pref.nagasaki.jp/bunkadb/index.php/view/412|title=彼杵の古墳|work=長崎県|accessdate=2023-12-25}}
※上記リンク先のlocationは、文化財指定当時の自治体である[[彼杵町]]時代の郷の地名（住所表記）のままとなっているため注意。 |位置={{Coord|33|2|8|N|129|55|12|E|type:landmark_region:JP-42|display=inline,title}} |type=[[前方後円墳]] |area=全長58.8[[メートル|m]]（後円部直径37.7m、高さ6.3m、くびれ部の幅11.0m、前方部長さ21.1m、幅18.5m、高さ2.6m） |Interred Persons=不明 |built=5世紀 |Historic Site Designation=[[1950]]（昭和25th year ）県指定史跡「彼杵の古墳」 |image={{image requested|cat=東彼杵郡}} |地図 = Japan Nagasaki |アイコン = 前方後円墳-東南東 |ラベル = ひさご塚
古墳 |ラベル位置 = bottom }} '''Hisagozuka Kofun''' (ひさご塚古墳, also known as ひょうたん塚 or "Hiragana-no-Kofun" in its Historic Site1 name) is an ancient Kofun ({{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|qid=Q1141225|lt=Kofun|1=Kofun}}) located in {{ill|Higashisonogi, Nagasaki|en|Higashisonogi, Nagasaki|qid=Q942035|lt=Higashisonogi Town|1=Higashisonogi, Nagasaki}}, {{ill|Higashisonogi District, Nagasaki|en|Higashisonogi District, Nagasaki|qid=Q1156370|lt=Higashisonogi District|1=Higashisonogi District, Nagasaki}}, {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|en|Nagasaki Prefecture|qid=Q169376|lt=Nagasaki Prefecture|1=Nagasaki Prefecture}}. The tumulus has a {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|qid=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpōkōenfun}} design and was Historic Site1 as a Nagasaki Prefectural Historic Site under the name "Sonogi-no-Kofun" (彼杵の古墳) on April 10, 1950.{{Cite web|author=長崎県教育庁学芸文化課|url=http://www.pref.nagasaki.jp/bunkadb/index.php/view/412|title=彼杵の古墳|work=長崎県|accessdate=2023-12-25}} == Overview == The Hisagozuka Kofun dates back to the mid-{{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|qid=Q459939|lt=Kofun period|1=Kofun period}}, approximately the early 5th century, and is one of the largest tumuli in Nagasaki Prefecture. The site is situated adjacent to the {{ill|Michinoeki Sonogi-no-Sho|ja|道の駅彼杵の荘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Michinoeki Sonogi-no-Sho|1=Roadside station Sonogi-no-sho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11641298}} roadside station within the "Historical Park Sonogi-no-Sho" (歴史公園 彼杵の荘). After undergoing restoration, the tumulus now offers a complete view of its keyhole type. Additionally, burial goods such as burial items are on display at the historical folklore museum within the park. == Specifications == * '''type''': Keyhole-shaped mound (前方後円墳) * '''Total Length''': 58.8 meters ** '''Rear Circular Section''': Diameter 37.7 meters, Height 6.3 meters ** '''Neck Constriction''': Width 11.0 meters ** '''Front Rectangular Section''': Length 21.1 meters, Width 18.5 meters, Height 2.6 meters * '''built''': Early 5th century * '''Interred_individual''': Unknown == See Also == * {{ill|List of Historic Sites in Nagasaki Prefecture|ja|長崎県cultural property一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Historic Sites in Nagasaki Prefecture|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|List of Kofun in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11505809}} * {{ill|List of Kofun in Japan with the Name "Hyō"|lt=List of Kofun in Japan with the Name "Hyō"|lt=List of tumuli named with "Hyotan"|ja|「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of tumuli named with "Hyotan"|qq=}} == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [http://www.pref.nagasaki.jp/bunkadb/index.php/view/412 Nagasaki Prefecture Historic Site (Sonogi-no-Kofun)] {{Japanese-history-stub}} {{Cultural properties of Japan}} {{translated page|ja|ひさご塚古墳|version=99016791|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:ひさご塚古墳]] {{wikidata link|Q11276192}} [[Category:Designated historic sites of Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Higashisonogi Town]] [[Category:Image Requests for Higashisonogi District]] [[Category:Kofun of Nagasaki prefecture]] [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]]
